# Why I’m Building This Site

I wanted one place that clearly shows who I am, what I’m working on, and what I care about building.

A GitHub profile is useful, but it is not enough. It is too fragmented. A personal site gives me control over the story.

## What I want this site to do

- Show my current projects
- Track what I am learning
- Give people a better picture of my work than a résumé alone

## What comes next

I plan to keep improving the project gallery and publish short posts regularly.
